Title: Saotra atolotra anao re ry Raiko

Lyrics.text:
Saotra atolotra Anao re ry Raiko
Efa namonjy ny aiko Ianao
Sy nanazava tokoa ny saiko
Ka nanova ahy ho mpandova Anao
Ref:
Fitiavana re avy amin - dRay,
Fampindram - po be
No hafatra torina indray (indray).

Tena tsy takatry ny saiko loatra
'Zany fitia nampidina Anao
Honina aty anatiko mpanota
Tena tsy mendrika hitoeranao

Raiso ho Anao ity fo kely ity
Raiso ny aiko Ray ka mba sasao
Tena tsy mendrika nefa avia,
Raiso ihany ka diovy ho Anao

Tompo hazony fandrao dia ho lasa,
‘Ndrao very aho raha lavitra Anao;
Nefa mbola ato ny fo ’zay mikasa
Sady mitempo te hahita Anao
